rules: 95% of the UI should be monochrome.
Color exists only to guide action.
Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Tint neutrals slightly.
Headings (Size > 32px) MUST use tight letter spacing.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.
Line Height: Tight for headers, Loose for body.

spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) for Data-heavy Dashboards and Features Sections.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp edges or subtle roundness, max 8px (rounded-md).
rules: Grid items must be direct children.
Override default stretch behavior on grid with align-items: start where necessary.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2

inputs.default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-gray-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent

tags.default: bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium border border-gray-200

rules: Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions but heavily customize to match the Swiss archetype (sharp, high contrast).
Do NOT overuse card component. Go cardless, rectangular, dense styles where appropriate.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

image_urls.description: Abstract AI resume to network transformation for landing page hero background/illustration.
Smiling professional user avatar for dashboard profile.
Minimalist modern app logo image to use as a placeholder or abstract brand representation.
HP company logo for job listing.
Telegram company logo for job listing.
Abstract green tech company logo for job listing.
Abstract blue tech company logo for job listing.
Abstract purple tech company logo for job listing.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Minimalist — use micro-interactions for feedback. Fast transitions (0.2s).
accessibility_and_motion.accessibility: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text. Use aria-hidden on decorative elements. Support prefers-reduced-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React (.js/jsx) and Tailwind CSS.
Follow the theme and color scheme strictly. Do not introduce generic SaaS blue for everything; stick to the monochromatic base with Electric Blue (#2563EB) accents.
Implement the landing page using the 'Tetris' grid layout logic and the dashboard using the 'Control Room' dense grid.
For the job search functionality, create a dedicated drag-and-drop zone for Resume Upload (PDF/DOCX) with clear visual feedback.
Use the provided image URLs for the hero section, user avatars, and company logos in the job listings.
Ensure ALL interactive elements and key information areas include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case based on role.
The header must have a background (solid or glassmorphism) if sticky, and should not use generic transparent backgrounds over content.
